body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nested Agency** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nested agency — voluntary action, free will as constructed experience, intentional binding.

**BOLD signal variability as potential new biomarker of functional neurological disorders.**. Neuroimage Clin.. PMID: 38833899. DOI: 10.1016/j.nicl.2024.103625. BACKGROUND: Functional neurological disorder (FND) is acommon neuropsychiatric condition with established diagnostic criteria and effective treatments but for which the underlying neuropathophysiological mechanisms remain incompletely understood. Recent neuroimaging studies have revealed FND as amulti-network brain disorder, unveiling alterations across limbic, self-agency, attentional/salience, and sensorimotor networks.
